case_title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC VS. TRINIDAD ESPINOZA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ., RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, TRINIDAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3736 CESAR CHAVEZ STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110., **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, TRINIDAD

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, TRINIDAD
